articles.description: A mass wedding ceremony in India’s capital, supported financially by an NGO and endorsed by the Delhi government, is a relief from dowry and wedding expenses. topStories.title: Hundreds Of Special Forces, Dozens Of Planes: How US Rescued Pilot From Iran

topStories.description: Trump's escalating rhetoric over the Strait of Hormuz comes amid a steep rise in global oil prices. While the price of Brent Crude has increased over 50% since the start of the war, gas prices have also seen a steep increase in the US, which goes for crucial midterm elections later this year.

Congressman Seth Moulton criticised the platform, leading to its removal. He emphasized the need for regulation of prediction markets by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission.
